Video.summary: A roiling sky incites ocean violence.

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded waterfall.

Video.summary: A woodland scene lit by the waning rays of the sun.

Video.summary: Bob paints velvety green foliage.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Soothing Vista

Video.summary: A playful brook complements a range of rugged mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Mountain Brook

Video.summary: Bob creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Misty Rolling Hills

Video.summary: Bob paints a thawing landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Not Quite Spring

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint forest cabin.

Video.title: New Day's Dawn

Video.summary: A cabin in a peaceful resting place among a warm setting of lush, lakeside greenery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lakeside Cabin

Video.summary: A wilderness path leads to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob accents with an abundance of trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterside Way

Video.summary: Bob paints a southern scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cypress Swamp

Video.summary: Bob's use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to a woodside setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.

Video.title: Hunter's Haven

Video.title: Autumn Palette
